description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker with a sleek, streamlined silhouette and a rounded toe. The upper is predominantly black with three parallel white stripes on the side, characteristic of Adidas branding, and a contrasting light gray heel cap. The shoe features a lace-up closure with black laces and eyelets, and a white rubber sole that wraps around the base, providing a clean separation from the upper. The tongue and collar are padded for comfort, and the heel has a rectangular patch, likely for branding or size information. The overall design is sporty yet casual, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A black and white low-top sneaker with three side stripes, lace-up closure, and a white rubber sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing three white stripes, black upper, and light gray heel cap.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gray heel cap and rectangular heel patch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three white stripes and visible lace area.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the rounded toe, lace-up closure, and tongue.
attribute_logo: Three white stripes on the side; rectangular patch on heel, likely with logo.
